Meta.title: Giannis Kapelakos | Premium Full-Stack Web Developer
Meta.description: Portfolio of Giannis Kapelakos, a freelance Full-Stack Web Developer building high-performance, polished, and modern web applications.

Hero.name: Giannis Kapelakos
Hero.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
Hero.subtitle: I build fast, scalable, and modern web applications for businesses, startups, and individuals.

About.title: About Me
About.subtitle: Crafting premium digital experiences through clean code and user-centered design.
About.paragraph1: I am a self-taught Full-Stack Developer with a deep-seated passion for creating high-performance software, seamless automation, and polished user experiences. My journey started with curiosity and evolved into a professional commitment to crafting elegant digital products.
About.paragraph2: I thrive at the intersection of development and design, ensuring that every interface is not only visually stunning but also fast, secure, and accessible. In addition to web development, I am a Linux power user, an open-source enthusiast, and a firm believer in automating repetitive tasks to maximize efficiency.

Skills.title: Skills & Expertise
Skills.subtitle: The technologies and methodologies I use to bring ideas to life.

Projects.title: Featured Projects
Projects.subtitle: A selection of recent projects built with modern technologies.
Projects.openSourceSubtitle: Helper scripts and libraries built for the developer community.

backplane.name: Backplane
backplane.desc: A premium business landing page showcasing a modern software platform with reusable components, responsive layouts, elegant animations, and a clean professional design.

pennypilot.name: PennyPilot
pennypilot.desc: A modern personal finance application for budgeting and expense tracking featuring a clean dashboard, responsive design, and intuitive user experience.

autopilot.name: Autopilot Linux Script
autopilot.desc: A Linux automation script that streamlines system setup, package installation, and post-install configuration.

Terminal.title: Giannis' Linux Console
Terminal.welcome: Welcome to Giannis' Portfolio Terminal v1.0.0. Type 'help' to see available commands.
Terminal.helpText:
Available commands:
  help        - Show this menu
  about       - Brief introduction
  skills      - List core skills
  projects    - Show projects with links
  contact     - Display contact information
  clear       - Clear the terminal screen
  exit        - Close the terminal
  neofetch    - Show system information
Terminal.aboutText: Giannis Kapelakos is a Full-Stack Developer specializing in React, Next.js, Node.js, and Linux automation. He builds fast, responsive, and beautiful websites.
Terminal.skillsText:
Frontend: React, Next.js, TS, JS, HTML, CSS, Tailwind
Backend: Node.js, REST APIs, Databases
Tools: Linux, Git, GitHub, Vercel, SEO, Performance
Terminal.projectsText:
1. Backplane - Premium business landing page: https://backplane-website.vercel.app/
2. PennyPilot - Personal finance tool: https://pennypilot-website.vercel.app/
3. Autopilot Script - Linux setup script: https://github.com/gkapelakos/Autopilot-Linux-Script
Terminal.contactText:
Email: gkapelakos@gmail.com (placeholder)
GitHub: github.com/gkapelakos
LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/gkapelakos
